title: Heath Richards contracted for MI New York
description: GARDEN ROUTE - Six Gun Grill Garden Route...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE - Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers cricketer Heath Richards was recently included in the MI New York squad for the T20 Major League that will be contested in the United States of America in June and July.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE - Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers cricketer Heath Richards was recently included in the MI New York squad for the T20 Major League that will be contested in the United States of America in June and July."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A few well-known international players, including Kieron Pollard and Nicholaas Pooran (both West Indies), Trent Boult and Micheal Bracewall (both New Zealand), Rashid Khan (Afghanistan) and the South African Quinton de Kock are alongside him on the name list."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Richards is a batting all-rounder, but is renowned for his destructive and hard-hitting batting skills.","html":"Richards is a batting all-rounder, but is renowned for his destructive and hard-hitting batting skills."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Heath Richards contracted for MI New York
